Your cozy home in Da Nang

Homestay

A warm retreat in the heart of Da Nang — cozy rooms, local charm, and hospitality that feels like family.

WARM HOSPITALITYWe care about your stay
Hello, we are

Casadana

Casadana was created with the hope of offering a warm and cozy retreat where you can take a break from the everyday and enjoy peaceful moments with family, friends, or by yourself. Every corner of the house has been thoughtfully designed to provide comfort, warmth, and the feeling of being right at home.

STANDARD COMFORT

Deluxe Room

Two cozy bedrooms, each furnished with a 1.4m double bed, a wardrobe, a dressing table, and a private en-suite bathroom with all essential amenities.

LUXURY & EXCLUSIVITY

Master Room

A spacious 1.6m queen-size bed and a large floor-to-ceiling window filling the room with natural light for a bright, airy stay.

Living Room

A warm gathering space with a comfortable sofa and projector, perfect for movie nights.

Kitchen & Dining

Fully equipped with cooktop, fridge and all utensils for easy home-cooked meals.

Massage Chair

A full-body massage chair to unwind and recharge after a day of exploring.

Prime Location

Perfectly located in Da Nang, Casadana offers easy access to the city’s most popular attractions and everyday conveniences.

Da Nang Int'l Airport

2.5 km · 10–15 min by car

Chợ Cồn – Con Market

850 m · Local food & shopping

Dragon Bridge

1.3 km · Iconic landmark
Enjoy your stay!
